title: BRANCH-MANIFEST
description: Per-repo manifest declaring branches and their lifecycle. Authority: flywheel-m9yxr research (2026-05-20). Mission Duty 3 (substrate-published) + Duty 5a (auto-push, jrpfn).

declared_bead.description: Bead ID this branch implements. Branches without a declared bead are reaper candidates by default.

lifecycle.description: merge_to_main=normal feature branch; abandon=workshop branch, do not merge; extract_to_repo=will move to another repo; long_running=integration branch (e.g. develop).

last_pushed_at.description: Last successful push to remote. Drives auto-push cadence per flywheel-jrpfn.

upstream_state.description: From `git for-each-ref --format='%(upstream:track)'`. 'gone'=upstream branch deleted from remote.

lifecycle_state.description: stale=N>90d no commits + no open PR. Reaper candidate.

labels.description: Reaper carve-outs: keep-alive, pending-pr, archived-snapshot, joshua-gated, cross-orch-active, defer-gated.
